title: Caught by the Octopus: Bennett’s Darkest Hour ransomware incident

victim.name: Caught by the Octopus: Bennett’s Darkest Hour

extortion.description: Hello Naftali, Today is not just another day in your calendar of illusions. Today, we celebrate the second birthday of Handala in this digital battlefield, a spirit twenty years old, dwelling in the body of a two-year-old phenomenon. For two years, Handala has moved silently beside the most guarded politicians and the so-called untouchable architects…
